reasoning: The Lean signature faithfully formalizes the informal statement. The piecewise function is correctly encoded: `if x < -1 then -1 else (if x ≤ 0 then 3x+2 else -2x+2)` properly matches the three cases (x<-1, -1≤x≤0, x>0). The boundary values are consistent (at x=-1 both cases give -1, at x=0 both cases give 2), so the piecewise function is well-defined under either convention.
